PluginEnvVariables.title: Plugin Global Variables
PluginEnvVariables.isPluginSubtitle: Only variables used by this plugin are displayed, synchronized to global after editing
PluginEnvVariables.allPluginSubtitle: Stores all plugin global variables, double-click value to modify, unconfigured variables won't show here
PluginEnvVariables.modifyToSave: Please modify the content and try again
